title: Melody Mint (Design Concept)
description: Prove you minted N songs as NFTs on Smol without revealing which songs or your total collection size.
smartWallet: any — uses your connected Smol wallet

designInputs.mintRoot: Merkle root of all user mint transaction hashes
designInputs.leafProofs: Merkle paths for N specific mint events (private)
designInputs.mintCount: Number of mints to prove (threshold, not exact)

designOutputs.mintThreshold: Boolean — user minted at least N songs
designOutputs.rootValid: Boolean — Merkle root matches on-chain state

verification: On-chain via Protocol 25 BN254 pairing check against Smol contract mint events.
note: Design concept. Would prove music NFT minting activity without revealing specific songs, preserving creator privacy while proving participation.
